About Me

Get to know the person behind the clips

My Story

I am a new content creator, I have been growing at a massive rate and I am very very VERY grateful!!! I have a great community that supports me and my goals. I have put a lot of time effort and money into growing my channel.

As of writing this I have 747 YT subs, 3 TikTok followers, 24 Discord members and 9 Twitch followers. I am hoping to grow on TikTok and Twitch I have started them not that long ago and I still have a while to grow but if you could can you pls help me grow on my other social media accounts!! :)
